title: NIST 800-53 IA-2(1) — TEAP Joint User+Machine Authentication Evidence

compliance.assurance_rationale: NIST 800-53 IA-2(1) — multi-factor authentication for privileged accounts. UC-17.1.69 evidences TEAP joint user+machine authentication adoption.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that TEAP joint user+machine authentication is in use for privileged-network access, supporting IA-2(1) MFA requirements.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.14.81' archiving TEAP adoption evidence to `audit_evidence` with `nist_clause=IA-2(1)`.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode=5200 earliest=-1d
| stats count, count(eval(EapAuthentication=="EAP-TEAP")) as teap_count by site, ssid_or_nad
| eval teap_pct=round(teap_count/count*100, 2), nist_clause="IA-2(1)", control="MFA_Network_Auth"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence NIST 800-53 IA-2(1) via TEAP joint user+machine adoption tracking.
value: TEAP provides true joint user+machine attestation — equivalent to MFA for network access. NIST auditors require evidence of MFA coverage; this UC produces it.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for CMMC 2.0 evidence.
knownFalsePositives: 1. Initial TEAP rollout — adoption builds gradually.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.69 operational.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.14.81: NIST 800-53 IA-2(1) — TEAP Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.14.81,reg=NIST_800_53,clause=IA-2(1)
```
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence NIST 800-53 IA-2(1) via TEAP joint user+machine adoption tracking. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.

controlTest.negativeScenario: No TEAP usage. Evidence captures gap; remediation triggered.

evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with NIST 800-53 IA-2(1) tagging.
